data.body: ddbe full-suite pre-flight: 5375 passed / 3 failed. Diagnosed: (1+2) test_mcp_output_schema_coverage FAILs -> new create_identity MCP tool needed registration in the coverage LEDGER (CANONICAL + sample-args); added it (legit registration, ADDS round-trip coverage, not weakening) -> 28 pass. (3) test_resolve_symbol_confirms_third_party_module FAILs identically on CLEAN origin/main (verified via git stash) -> pre-existing env quirk (yaml third-party/stdlib classification), NOT from my diff. Net: 0 failures attributable to ddbe. Proceeding to commit + Gerrit push.
